instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect low battery voltage conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect low voltage when Battery_Voltage falls below Voltage_Low_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Battery_Voltage < Voltage_Low_Limit THEN Low_Voltage_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent shifting during critical low voltage.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall block shift commands when Battery_Voltage falls below Critical_Voltage.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall maintain safe gear during low voltage.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall maintain predefined gear when low voltage condition occurs.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disable non critical features during low voltage.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disable adaptive shift learning when voltage falls below threshold.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect voltage recovery.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall clear low voltage condition when Battery_Voltage returns above recovery threshold.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect voltage sensor failure.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect voltage sensor fault when signal remains outside valid range.

L4_requirements: IF Battery_Voltage OUTSIDE Valid_Voltage_Range THEN Voltage_Sensor_Fault = TRUE
IF Battery_Voltage WITHIN Valid_Voltage_Range THEN Maintain_Normal_Operation

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disable start stop feature during low voltage.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall block start stop activation when Battery_Voltage falls below Voltage_Low_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Start_Stop_Request = TRUE AND Battery_Voltage < Voltage_Low_Limit THEN Reject_Start_Stop_Request

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall protect solenoids during low voltage.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disable solenoid activation when Battery_Voltage falls below critical limit.

L4_requirements: IF Solenoid_Control_Active = TRUE AND Battery_Voltage < Critical_Voltage THEN Trigger_Solenoid_Fault

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall log diagnostic data during low voltage events.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall store diagnostic information when low voltage condition occurs.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall restore normal behavior after voltage recovery.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall restore shift operations when battery voltage returns to normal.
